name: Data Engineer
description: The DataCamp Certified Data Engineer certification validates expertise in building, maintaining, and optimizing data infrastructure. Earners demonstrate proficiency in data management, Python/SQL programming for data engineering workflows, exploratory data analysis, and the ability to design scalable pipelines. Certification is awarded upon passing both timed theoretical exams and a practical submission exam.

criteria.narrative: Candidates must pass timed exams covering data management and programming for data engineering, as well as a practical exam demonstrating the ability to build real-world data pipelines.
